case_title: ROBERTO A. GRAU VS. LUCY M. ARELLANO

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. DEFENDANT'S CHALLENGE TO VENUE IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT LUCY M. ARELLANO WAS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT SF DEPT. OF CHILD SUPPORT PRESENT REPRESENTED BY GRACE GLENN OF THE CITY ATTORNEY'S OFFICE AND WAIVES SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J. BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
